name: tech-tools
description: Henssler IT domain-cluster plugins: MSP operations, security and compliance, Microsoft 365, HR/payroll, finance, plus engineering, design, data, support, product, and productivity, with the orchestrate multi-agent coding meta-agent. Each vendor tool is bundled into the business domain it serves.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Atlas is a self-configuring multi-agent coding architect. The /atlas command and a SessionStart boot load and wire the whole runtime automatically: the atlas-engine methodology (research -> theory -> test -> validate -> implement -> verify, evidence before any done claim), a 14-agent subagent squad (atlas:explorer, atlas:implementer, atlas:verifier, atlas:planner, atlas:db-prober, atlas:ui-runtime-tester, the five-agent UI/UX test swarm, and the docs curators/auditors), seven auto-loaded automation hooks, and a library of verification-gated /atlas-* launcher commands (feature, frontend, component, debug, refactor, readme, gitignore, handoff, db-audit, grafana, m365, vendor-assessment, harden) that all share one neutral operating contract. Atlas integrates claude-mem and context-mode (recommend then confirm), discovers and recommends the skills/plugins/MCP a project needs, and improves itself over time: a self-improvement nudge captures lessons to memory and committed .agents/ notes so the next session starts ahead.

plugins.name: it-operations
plugins.description: MSP IT operations across RMM, PSA, networking, endpoint, backup, and documentation. Bundles NinjaOne and ConnectWise Automate (RMM), ConnectWise PSA (tickets, time, agreements), Auvik (network monitoring), ImmyBot (endpoint automation), Kaseya IT Glue (documentation), Kaseya Spanning (M365/Google backup), and Azure operations, plus core operations skills: change management, process optimization, resource planning, risk assessment, compliance tracking, and vendor management.

plugins.name: security-compliance
plugins.description: Security and compliance operations. Bundles Vanta (SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA GRC), KnowBe4 (security awareness), ThreatLocker (zero-trust endpoint), Blumira (SIEM and detection), and Proofpoint plus Checkpoint Avanan (email security), alongside core audit-readiness, evidence-gap, risk-heatmap, and approval-triage skills.

plugins.name: microsoft-365
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 administration and identity. Bundles native M365 management (users, mailboxes, Teams, OneDrive, licensing, security posture), Microsoft Graph and Entra reporting, and CIPP multi-tenant management (tenant health, standards drift, secure score, offboarding).

plugins.name: hr-payroll
plugins.description: HR and payroll operations. Bundles Paylocity (roster snapshots, new-hire flow, pay-rate and deduction/tax audits) plus core HR skills: compensation benchmarking, recruiting pipeline, interview prep, org planning, people analytics, and employee handbook authoring.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Finance and revenue operations. Bundles PandaDoc (proposals, contracts, document workflows) and Pax8 (licensing, orders, subscriptions, invoices) plus core accounting skills: financial close, journal entry prep, reconciliation, variance analysis, financial statements, and SOX audit workflows.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Software engineering skills: code review, system design, incident response, testing strategy, and tech-debt management, plus Cowork plugin authoring and customization tooling.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Review accessibility, critique designs, manage design systems, write UX copy, and synthesize user research for product and design teams.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Explore datasets, write SQL queries, validate data quality, build visualizations, and generate interactive dashboards.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, research customer questions, manage escalations, and build knowledge-base articles for support teams.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, and synthesize user research faster. Keep stakeholders updated and stay ahead of the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Workplace productivity utilities: two-tier memory management and task tracking, plus enterprise search and knowledge synthesis, PDF viewing/form-filling/signing, brand-voice enforcement, and nudge reminders.
